My Journey

Professional Journey

ACT Fibernet

Customer Care Executive

I began my professional journey as a Customer Care Executive at ACT Fibernet, where I developed a strong foundation in customer relationship management and problem-solving. In this role, I assisted customers with technical support, billing inquiries, service activations, and upgrades while ensuring timely resolution of issues. I also handled escalations, coordinated with technical teams, and provided clear guidance on service plans, helping customers make informed decisions.

IndusInd Bank

Product Sales Specialist

Building on this experience, I transitioned into a Product Sales Specialist role at IndusInd Bank. Here, I strengthened my communication and sales skills by managing outbound calls, generating leads, and educating customers about financial products. I was responsible for verification and rejection handling, as well as converting customer credit card dues into EMI plans through consistent follow-ups and relationship building.

Kotak Mahindra Bank

Banking & Customer Service

I later joined Kotak Mahindra Bank, where I expanded my expertise in banking operations and customer service. My responsibilities included resolving customer inquiries, ensuring compliance with banking regulations, assisting with account management, and helping users navigate digital banking platforms. I also supported account openings, loan services, and handled requests for banking essentials like cheque books and debit cards.

NGO

Partnerships & Outreach

My journey further evolved when I worked with an NGO, where I managed customer concerns related to healthcare discounts and built partnerships with hospitals. I created and shared Proposal & MOU letters to hospitals for tie-ups and followed up with them through emails and calls. I also volunteered in health camps, facilitated Ayushman card registrations, and maintained structured data records, contributing to both outreach and operational efficiency.

U.S.-based Alkaline Water Ionizer Company

Digital Marketing & Operations (2025)

In 2025, I joined a U.S.-based company working on an alkaline water ionizer product, where I initially handled digital marketing tasks such as creating promotional content and producing AI-generated videos using advanced tools. Over time, I took on broader responsibilities, including managing business operations and coordinating with educational institutions, while also contributing to e-commerce activities like product listings, marketing strategies, and sales support.

Hydrogen Water Ionizer Venture

Authorized Channel Partner — Telangana & Andhra Pradesh (2026)

In 2026, I stepped into an entrepreneurial role as an Authorized Channel Partner for a Hydrogen Water Ionizer venture, leading operations across Telangana and Andhra Pradesh. I built the business from the ground up, including team hiring, distributor network development, investor outreach, and conducting product presentations and live demonstrations.

Today

Entrepreneur

Now, as an entrepreneur, I focus on helping businesses scale through operational efficiency, digital marketing, and smart process implementation. I collaborate closely with business owners to drive digital transformation, optimize workflows, and create meaningful, results-driven growth strategies.

Manish Jain

Entrepreneur

I am an Entrepreneur with a passion for fostering professional growth and empowering businesses. I specialize in bridging the gap between talent and opportunity. I help businesses scale through operational efficiency, digital marketing, and smart process implementation—with experience across banking, non-profits, startups, and international collaborations.

I partner with business owners to optimize sales, implement smart work methodologies, and embrace digital transformation. With a deep understanding of both individual career journeys and organizational needs, I create impactful connections and deliver tangible results for a thriving professional ecosystem.
